title: rubus rostellatus
intro: Rubus rostellatus, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Himalayan Bramble, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus rostellatus include its potential to reduce fever, relieve digestive problems, and even have antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and fruits are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal benefits.
